node.text: That cute thing your pet does? There’s a tune for that. Upload a clip to Gemini + select Create Music to make their track.

node.text:
Pixel 10a is available for pre-order today in four colors: Lavender, Berry, Fog and Obsidian. 

Learn more at link in bio.
Swipe to learn more about Gemini’s new feature that lets you create custom 30-second tracks from a prompt or pic ➡️🎵

node.text:
The community reached the goal. 🥁⁠
⁠
Google I/O returns May 19-20, 2026. Thank you to everyone who joined the solve.⁠
⁠
Check the link in bio to register. 🔗
Happy Lunar New Year! Swipe through the #GoogleDoodle to explore the rituals that invite prosperity, luck, and abundance for the year ahead. 🧧✨

node.text: Wondering how Team USA’s Ilia Malinin survives the spins? Search with AI Mode for the science behind it.
Need a football translator for today’s game? Use AI Mode in Search! These prompts turn confusing rules into pop culture references and help you style your game day outfit.
Full of questions about @teamusa? Get answers with Search.

node.text: #sponsored I was jealous of how much air #TeamUSA ski jumpers get, so I asked Google Search to picture me in one of their suits. Honestly, not as much of a Jerry as I thought 🤩
It’s tough to tell one flip from another when @teamusa is moving that fast 🏂 But these searches can help.

user.full_name: B R I T T A N Y 💫 B O W E

node.text: Whether you’re on your way to the game or just the snack table, transform your gameday fit into a tunnel fit with #NanoBanana
Save this nail art prompt for your next ski trip ❄️ Open the Google app, tap Lens, hit 🍌, and use our prompt to get started.

node.text:
This Black History Month, we’re turning it up for the visionary hip-hop producers who flipped the script, chopped the sample and pushed the art of beat making to new frontiers. 

#GoogleDoodle track composed by guest artist @illajyanceyboy

node.text: Ready for your debut? Search "bridgerton" for a dazzling surprise 💎
The first Gemini Drops of 2026 is here! 🥳 Swipe for a look at what we’ve rolled out so far in the new year. ➡️

node.text:
Project Genie is our experimental research prototype that lets you create and explore virtual worlds. 🌎

Powered by our Genie 3 model, it generates interactive environments in real-time as you navigate.

Here’s how it works:
🔵 Design your world and character using text and visual prompts.
🔵 Nano Banana Pro makes an image preview that you can adjust.
🔵 Genie 3 generates the environment in real-time as you move through.
🔵 Remix existing worlds or discover new ones in the gallery. 

We’re rolling this out now to @Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S. (18+)

Start exploring at the link in bio 🔗

node.text: #sponsored You can imagine endless outfit ideas… or you can just ask Google.

The view from here just got even clearer 👀

(Created with Nano Banana Pro)

Chrome just keeps getting better with Gemini 3 🎢 Swipe to see how new updates to Gemini in Chrome can help you get more done with less toggling. From a built-in side panel to auto browse (now available for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers in the US), browsing with Chrome is a smoother ride.

node.text:
You’re trying to sleep but 🎺💥🐘, your neighbor has other ideas.

Our new animated short film “Dear Upstairs Neighbors” is previewing at @sundanceorg. Hear from Pixar alum Connie He as she explores creating this piece with a 45-person team of animation veterans, an Academy Award winner, researchers and engineers.

Search just got even more helpful with Personal Intelligence in AI Mode. Opt in by securely connecting your Gmail and Google Photos apps to Search and get unique recommendations that are tailored to you.

node.text:
Meet Personal Intelligence in AI Mode in Search. Now, you can securely connect Search to Google apps like Gmail and Google Photos to get responses that are uniquely relevant to you. 

Here’s VP of Product for Google Search, Robby Stein, on how this makes Search even more helpful.

(The ability to connect AI Mode to your Gmail and Google Photos is rolling out as a Labs feature. Eligible Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers in English in the U.S. will automatically have access to the feature as it becomes available.)

This Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Day, we celebrate with a #GoogleDoodle painted by artist Kyndacee. Inspired by her personal memories of MLK Day parades, the painting represents joy, unity, and shared moments.

“For this MLK Day, I wanted to blend personal nostalgia with a major tradition: the MLK Day Parade. Through the energy of the marching bands and community groups, this piece reflects the unity and vibrant spirit that define Dr. King’s legacy.”

“Ready for the Parade” by Kyndacee

node.text:
Smarter. More personal. An assistant that helps you navigate your world.

VP of Gemini Josh Woodward breaks down Personal Intelligence in the @googlegemini and how it makes Gemini a more personal, proactive, and powerful assistant.

node.text: Stop staring at those awkward corners! Snap a pic and let Search create design concepts. Here’s how to get options: Ask, “how can this space function better?” Then say, “now try another vibe and style.” Open the Google app →  Tap Lens →  Hit 🍌 →  Ask away!

node.text: Turn your pet pics into nature docs with Veo 3.1. Here’s how: Open the @googlegemini app, select “Create videos (Veo 3.1),” upload your photo, add your prompt, and remember to specify the narrator’s voice and tone for cinematic effect.
Is your “new year, new me” energy starting to fade? 😅 Swipe for the perfect prompt to turn your big resolution into smaller, more manageable steps. Then drop it into AI Mode in Search.

node.text:
Stop planning and start seeing the new you. Open the Google app, tap Lens, hit 🍌, and prompt your dream look with “show me in a cute, hip outfit that screams 2026.”

(Everything you see here, from the people to the outfit morphs, was created entirely with Veo.)

node.text: Ever wanted to test a look before committing? Nano Banana in Search has your back. Just open Lens, click the banana, and take your nail art to the next level.

user.full_name: Google Japan / グーグル・ジャパン

node.text:
What if we could step into the life from a painting? 🖼️

"Moving Paintings", our recent collaboration with @fukuda_art_museum, uses Google's video generation model Veo to breathe life into masterpieces and reveal stories beyond the frame.

Hit the link in bio to zoom in on these living worlds.

もし、絵画の中に入り込むことができたら？

福田美術館 (@fukuda_art_museum) とのコラボレーション「Moving Paintings」では、Google の動画生成モデル「Veo」が名画に命を吹き込み、額縁のその先に広がる物語を描き出します。

動き出した作品の世界。詳しくは @googleartsculture のプロフィールリンクをクリックしてご確認ください。

node.text: Getting fit, getting crafty, getting out there. Today’s #GoogleDoodle is all about New Year, New Me energy. However you choose to reimagine your year, we’re here for the journey. Happy 2026! How are you starting the new year?
Ring in the new year with Nano Banana 🎊 From fuzzy felt to pastel crayon, it can bring any style to life. Open the Google app, tap Lens, and hit the 🍌 to start creating!

node.text: Unleash your inner ’80s icon right in Search! ✨ Open the Google app, tap Lens, hit 🍌, and add the prompt: “put me in an 80s glamour shot.”

node.text: Don’t let those old memories fade. Use Search to colorize and restore vintage family photos just in time for the holidays. Open Lens in the Google app, tap the 🍌, and use the prompt: “colorize and restore this photo.”

node.text:
Want to create your own snowy graphic for the holidays? Here’s how:

1️⃣ Open the Google app, tap Lens, hit the 🍌, and ask it to “reimagine this [image] fully white made out of snow, floating in front of a Christmas tree outdoors.”
2️⃣ If you’re a Pro/Ultra user, add motion by uploading the new snowy image to @googlegemini, selecting “Create videos (Veo 3.1),” and using the prompt: “[image] rotates and returns to the same spot. snow falling.”

node.text: What’s inside the box? 👀 We used Veo 3.1 to turn this gift into an imaginative, cinematic masterpiece, and the key was using descriptive language like “high resolution” and “hyperrealistic.” Try it yourself: Open the @googlegemini app and select “Create videos with Veo.”

node.text: From the court to the search bar, happy #WorldBasketballDay to the ballers who made this the W’s biggest year yet. 🏀 🔥 #YearInSearch @wnba

node.text:
Add some holiday cheer to your graphics with this two-step trick:

1️⃣ Create the image: Open the Google app, tap Lens, hit 🍌, add your image, and prompt: “transform the [image] into a 3d glass gradient wrapped with christmas lights, set against a dark gradient blue background.”

2️⃣ Add the spin: Pro/Ultra users, upload the new image to @googlegemini, select “Create videos (Veo 3.1),” and use the animation prompt: “the camera pushes backward and the [image] spins to its original position and stops after a full 360 degrees.”

The curiosity door is about to open.
Dec. 25th 👀 #ST5 #YearInSearch
Can’t stop. Another drop. Swipe for the TL;DR on all things new in the Gemini app.

node.text: Turn your selfie into the custom ornament your tree needs! Open the Google app, tap Lens, and hit the 🍌 icon.

The only thing sweeter than this holiday cookie is access to new AI creation tools in Google Search. With Gemini 3 Pro in AI Mode, you can visualize complex topics with interactive visuals and tools. And with Nano Banana Pro, you get advanced image creation to bring your ideas to life. Tap “Thinking with 3 Pro” in AI Mode’s drop-down menu to start creating.

node.text: Ever struggled to understand a complex concept? Introducing Gemini 3 in Search that uses a coding agent to build bespoke, interactive simulations and tools on-the fly. We brought together some of our team to give you a behind-the-scenes look.

node.text: Putt putt prompt ⛳️ Get tips on how to improve your form by uploading a video to Gemini and asking for feedback.

Meet Gemini 3 Flash ⚡ our newest model with frontier intelligence, built for speed and scale. 

Here’s what you should know:
🔵 Reasoning: It has PhD-level brainpower so it’s more helpful when answering difficult questions.

🔵 Multimodal: It understands anything you give it from text to videos to images – with a similar level of comprehension as 3 Pro.

🔵 Coding: For developers, it combines advanced coding skills with the speed needed to build interactive apps.  

🔵 Efficiency: It’s smarter about how it answers questions, taking less time to respond.

3 Flash is rolling out to everyone at no cost in the @googlegemini app and AI Mode in @google Search. Developers can also start building via the Gemini API in Google AI Studio and Google Antigravity.

Learn more at the link in bio. 🔗

#sponsored I’m always inspired by this magical time of year: the lights, the color, and of course, the sparkle.

node.text: Didn’t have time to make it to the portrait studio this year? Create a festive holiday card in no time with Search.
Pet won’t sit still? 😅 Skip the photo struggle and create that viral holiday look effortlessly. Open the Google app, tap Lens, and hit 🍌 to start.
